author: BuddyBridge
description: 在 Obsidian 中与 WorkBuddy/CodeBuddy 聊天，多轮对话，流式输出。 - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: ben4202121
manifest.description: An unofficial bridge for WorkBuddy and CodeBuddy, featuring multi-turn chat and streaming responses.
manifest.name: BuddyBridge

name: BuddyBridge

releases.author: ben4202121
releases.description:
v1.0.11 更新说明

  修复

  - 重启后恢复历史对话：修复了 BuddyBridgeChatView 未正确持有导致启动时无法加载已保存对话的问题。
  - “思考中”状态残留：流式响应结束后会重新渲染消息，清除占位思考指示器。
  - 思考块标签语义：标签现在正确反映思考是否结束，折叠/展开不再改变文字含义。
  - Windows 启动失败：优化 CLI 路径查找顺序，优先使用 .cmd/.exe；对 .cmd/.bat 启动添加 shell: true，避免 Node 18+ 报 EINVAL。

  优化

  - 输入框自动增高：textarea 会根据输入内容自动扩展，减少滚动条。
  - 代码合规：动态样式改为 CSS 自定义属性，折叠显隐改为 CSS 类切换，符合 Obsidian 插件审核规范。

  兼容性

  - minAppVersion 保持 1.5.0

  兼容性

  - minAppVersion 保持 1.5.0

  ---
  v1.0.11 Release Notes

  Fixes

  - Restored conversation history after restarting Obsidian.
  - Cleared the stuck “thinking” indicator after streaming completes.
  - Fixed thinking-block label semantics so it reflects completion state.
  - Improved Windows CLI startup: prefer .cmd/.exe and use shell: true for batch wrappers.

  Improvements

  - Auto-growing textarea.
  - Style changes now use CSS custom properties/classes instead of inline styles.

  Compatibility

  - minAppVersion remains 1.5.0

  ---

releases.author: ben4202121
releases.description:
Release Notes v1.0.9

  ---
  中文

  🎨 聊天面板 UI 全面升级

  - Assistant 消息支持 Markdown 渲染：代码块、表格、列表、引用、标题等现在都能正确显示。
  - 思考过程可折叠：默认收起，点击标题展开，减少视觉干扰。
  - 工具调用卡片化：读 / 写 / 搜索类工具自动显示不同图标，支持折叠。
  - 统一图标体系：新建、关闭、空状态、思考、工具等按钮全部使用 Obsidian/Lucide SVG 图标。
  - 更精致的视觉细节：引入设计令牌、按钮/tab 过渡动效、输入框 focus 高亮、空状态卡片、以及
  prefers-reduced-motion 适配。
  - 修复卡死问题：解决 renderMessages 改为异步后未正确 await 导致的「一直思考中」问题。
  - 右侧面板行为优化：使用 getRightLeaf(false) 避免重复创建侧边面板。

  ---
  English

  🎨 Chat Panel UI Overhaul

  - Markdown rendering for Assistant messages: Code blocks, tables, lists, blockquotes, and headings
  now render correctly.
  - Collapsible thinking blocks: Collapsed by default; click the header to expand.
  - Tool-call cards: Read / write / search tools show different icons and can be collapsed.
  - Unified icon system: New-chat, close, empty-state, thinking, and tool buttons all use
  Obsidian/Lucide SVG icons.
  - Polished visual details: Design tokens, button/tab transitions, input focus rings, empty-state
  card, and prefers-reduced-motion support.
  - Fixed stuck-thinking bug: Resolved the async race introduced when renderMessages became async and
  callers didn't await.
  - Right sidebar behavior: Use getRightLeaf(false) to avoid duplicate sidebar panels.

releases.author: ben4202121
releases.description:
## BuddyBridge 1.0.8

  ### 新增
  - 设置页增加 WorkBuddy 路径填写提示（含自定义安装指引）
  - README 增加手动查找 CodeBuddy 路径说明
  - README 增加权限授权提示词章节
  - 新增 workbuddy/ 目录，含初始化提示词文件

  ### 修复
  - API 版本兼容性优化

  ### What's New
  - Added WorkBuddy path hint in settings with custom install guide
  - Added manual CodeBuddy path finding instructions in README
  - Added permission authorization section in README
  - Added workbuddy/ setup prompts for new environment initialization

  ---

  **注意**：本插件为非官方第三方集成，需要配合 WorkBuddy / CodeBuddy 本地服务使用。
  **Note**: This is an unofficial third-party plugin. Requires WorkBuddy / CodeBuddy local service.

---

**Note**: This is an unofficial third-party plugin. Requires WorkBuddy / CodeBuddy local service.
